runtime_assertions.name: Module still installs cleanly after changes
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush cr && ddev drush pm:list --status=enabled 2>&1 | grep -q group_ai_pm && echo PASS || echo FAIL
runtime_assertions.rationale: Baseline sanity — any PHP syntax error or broken service definition prevents module from loading

runtime_assertions.name: Dashboard route exists and returns 200
runtime_assertions.rationale: Dashboard route must still be registered after controller rewrite

runtime_assertions.name: TaskStatusForm route exists with _form key
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$route = \Drupal::service('router.route_provider')->getRouteByName('group_ai_pm.task_overview'); $defaults = $route->getDefaults(); echo isset($defaults['_form']) ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL';" 2>/dev/null || echo 'FAIL'
runtime_assertions.rationale: Task overview route must use _form key for form processing pipeline

runtime_assertions.name: TaskStatusForm route has _admin_route TRUE
runtime_assertions.rationale: Task overview route must render with admin theme

runtime_assertions.name: Dashboard theme hook is registered
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$hooks = \Drupal::service('theme.registry')->get(); $found = FALSE; foreach (array_keys($hooks) as $hook) { if (strpos($hook, 'group_ai_pm_dashboard') !== FALSE || strpos($hook, 'dashboard') !== FALSE && strpos($hook, 'group_ai_pm') !== FALSE) { $found = TRUE; break; } } echo $found ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL';"
runtime_assertions.rationale: Dashboard theme hook must be registered for #theme render array to work

runtime_assertions.name: Dashboard library is defined
runtime_assertions.rationale: Dashboard CSS library must be discoverable by Drupal

runtime_assertions.name: Dashboard template file exists
runtime_assertions.command: find /tmp/phase20-VARIANT/web/modules/custom/group_ai_pm/templates/ -name '*dashboard*' -name '*.html.twig' | head -1 | grep -q . && echo PASS || echo FAIL
runtime_assertions.rationale: Twig template file must exist for theme hook rendering

runtime_assertions.name: Dashboard CSS file exists
runtime_assertions.command: find /tmp/phase20-VARIANT/web/modules/custom/group_ai_pm/css/ -name '*dashboard*' -name '*.css' | head -1 | grep -q . && echo PASS || echo FAIL
runtime_assertions.rationale: Dashboard CSS file must exist for library attachment

runtime_assertions.name: TaskStatusForm class exists and extends FormBase
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$rc = new \ReflectionClass('\\Drupal\\group_ai_pm\\Form\\TaskStatusForm'); echo $rc->isSubclassOf('\\Drupal\\Core\\Form\\FormBase') ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL';" 2>/dev/null || echo 'FAIL'
runtime_assertions.rationale: TaskStatusForm must extend FormBase for AJAX form processing

runtime_assertions.name: TaskStatusForm has AJAX callback method
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$rc = new \ReflectionClass('\\Drupal\\group_ai_pm\\Form\\TaskStatusForm'); $methods = $rc->getMethods(); $found = FALSE; foreach ($methods as $m) { if (strpos(strtolower($m->getName()), 'callback') !== FALSE || strpos(strtolower($m->getName()), 'status') !== FALSE && strpos(strtolower($m->getName()), 'update') !== FALSE) { $found = TRUE; break; } } echo $found ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL';" 2>/dev/null || echo 'FAIL'
runtime_assertions.rationale: TaskStatusForm must have an AJAX callback method for status updates

runtime_assertions.name: Project entity can still be created
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$project = \Drupal::entityTypeManager()->getStorage('project')->create(['title' => 'Test Project P20', 'status' => 'active']); $project->save(); echo $project->id() ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL';"
runtime_assertions.rationale: Baseline sanity — entity creation still works after module changes

runtime_assertions.name: Task entity can still be created
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$projects = \Drupal::entityTypeManager()->getStorage('project')->loadMultiple(); $pid = array_key_first($projects); $task = \Drupal::entityTypeManager()->getStorage('task')->create(['title' => 'Test Task P20', 'status' => 'todo', 'priority' => 'medium', 'project' => $pid]); $task->save(); echo $task->id() ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL';"
runtime_assertions.rationale: Baseline sanity — task creation with project reference still works

runtime_assertions.name: DashboardController class still has DI create() method
runtime_assertions.rationale: DashboardController must maintain DI pattern after rewrite

runtime_assertions.name: DashboardController content() executes without exception (empty state)
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$controller = \Drupal::classResolver()->getInstanceFromDefinition('\\Drupal\\group_ai_pm\\Controller\\DashboardController'); try { $result = $controller->content(); echo is_array($result) ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL'; } catch (\Exception $e) { echo 'FAIL: ' . $e->getMessage(); }"
runtime_assertions.rationale: Executes the dashboard controller empty-state code path — catches non-existent route references in Url::fromRoute() (e.g., 'group_ai_pm.project.add' vs 'entity.project.add_form') that only crash at render time

runtime_assertions.name: DashboardController content() executes with projects present
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$project = \Drupal::entityTypeManager()->getStorage('project')->create(['title' => 'Dashboard Render Test', 'status' => 'active']); $project->save(); $task = \Drupal::entityTypeManager()->getStorage('task')->create(['title' => 'Dash Task', 'status' => 'todo', 'priority' => 'medium', 'project' => $project->id()]); $task->save(); $controller = \Drupal::classResolver()->getInstanceFromDefinition('\\Drupal\\group_ai_pm\\Controller\\DashboardController'); try { $result = $controller->content(); echo is_array($result) ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL'; } catch (\Exception $e) { echo 'FAIL: ' . $e->getMessage(); }"
runtime_assertions.rationale: Exercises the populated dashboard code path — catches entity query field name errors (e.g., 'project_id' vs 'project') and entity method calls (getStatus(), getTitle()) that only execute when data exists

runtime_assertions.name: KanbanController board() executes without exception
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$project = \Drupal::entityTypeManager()->getStorage('project')->create(['title' => 'Board Render Test P20', 'status' => 'active']); $project->save(); $controller = \Drupal::classResolver()->getInstanceFromDefinition('\\Drupal\\group_ai_pm\\Controller\\KanbanController'); try { $result = $controller->board($project); echo is_array($result) ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL'; } catch (\Exception $e) { echo 'FAIL: ' . $e->getMessage(); }"
runtime_assertions.rationale: Executes the board controller to catch runtime errors like calling methods on wrong objects — complements phase 18's assertion for regression detection after dashboard rewrite
